mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) = 0 THEN 'today_due' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'overdue_1_3' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN 'overdue_4_7' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN 'overdue_8_14' ELSE 'overdue_gt_14' END AS `key`, SUM(unpaid_amount) AS amount FROM lease_bill WHERE historical = 0 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND unpaid_amount > 0 AND pay_status IN (0, 1) AND due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date <= CURDATE() GROUP BY CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) = 0 THEN 'today_due' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'overdue_1_3' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN 'overdue_4_7' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), due_date) BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN 'overdue_8_14' ELSE 'overdue_gt_14' END

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(unpaid_amount), 0) FROM lease_bill WHERE historical = 0 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND unpaid_amount > 0 AND pay_status IN (0, 1) AND due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date >= CURDATE() AND due_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT lb.tenant_id AS tenantId, t.tenant_name AS tenantName, t.tenant_phone AS tenantPhone, SUM(lb.unpaid_amount) AS unpaidAmount FROM lease_bill lb LEFT JOIN tenant t ON t.id = lb.tenant_id WHERE lb.historical = 0 AND lb.status = 1 AND lb.deleted = 0 AND lb.unpaid_amount > 0 AND lb.pay_status IN (0, 1) AND lb.due_date IS NOT NULL AND lb.due_date < CURDATE() GROUP BY lb.tenant_id, t.tenant_name, t.tenant_phone ORDER BY unpaidAmount DESC LIMIT 5
